response:
## Perspective Audit Summary

**Component/artifact reviewed:** Podcast Player
**Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Auditory Access, Screen Reader Semantic
**Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification, Contrast, Motion, Keyboard, Cognitive

### Findings by Severity

| Severity | Count |
|---|---|
| CRITICAL | 2 |
| MAJOR | 1 |
| MINOR | 1 |
| ENHANCEMENT | 0 |

### Perspectives That Passed

None of the escalated perspectives passed all checklist items.

### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role

**Front-End Dev**
- Missing transcripts for audio content — Auditory Access — CRITICAL — 1.2.1
- No pause control for auto-playing audio — Auditory Access — CRITICAL — 1.4.2
- Speed control changes not announced to screen readers — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 4.1.3

**Content Author**
- New episode badge missing `aria-label` — Screen Reader Semantic — MINOR — 1.1.1

### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification

- Transcripts for audio episodes are missing (1.2.1)
- Audio descriptions for visual content in episodes are unverified (1.2.5)

### Recommended Next Step

BLOCK (CRITICAL findings present — do not ship until resolved)

---

### Finding Details

```
**Finding:** Audio elements lack transcripts for speech content
**WCAG:** 1.2.1 Audio Only and Video Only (Prerecorded)
**Perspective:** Auditory Access
**Severity:** CRITICAL
**Route to:** Content Author (secondary: Front-End Dev)
**Evidence:** Audio elements have no `<track kind="transcript">` or adjacent transcript markup
**Fix:** Add transcript section below player with `<track>` element or visible transcript link
```

```
**Finding:** Auto-playing audio has no visible pause control in first focusable position
**WCAG:** 1.4.2 Audio Control
**Perspective:** Auditory Access
**Severity:** CRITICAL
**Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design)
**Evidence:** Audio auto-plays on episode selection with no pause button in first focus position
**Fix:** Add visible pause button as first focusable element when episode loads
```

```
**Finding:** Speed control changes not announced to screen readers
**WCAG:** 4.1.3 Status Messages
**Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design)
**Evidence:** Select element changes playback speed but no `aria-live` region announces change
**Fix:** Add `aria-live="polite"` region that announces "Playback speed set to Xx" on change
```

```
**Finding:** New episode badge missing accessible name
**WCAG:** 1.1.1 Non-Text Content
**Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic
**Severity:** MINOR
**Route to:** Content Author (secondary: Front-End Dev)
**Evidence:** `.new-badge` has `role="img"` but no `aria-label`
**Fix:** Add `aria-label="New episode"` to badge element
```

---

### A11y Evidence Finding

finding_id: podcast-player-missing-transcripts
fingerprint: 4a3b7d2e8f1c6a9d
source: perspective-audit Auditory Access checklist
wcag_or_apg: 1.2.1 Audio Only and Video Only (Prerecorded)
section_508_fpc_context: 508(c)(2)(e) - Audio content must have text alternatives
severity: CRITICAL
perspective_alarms: auditory_access=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM
evidence: Audio elements have no transcript markup in source code
reproduction_steps: Select any episode, no transcript appears in DOM
expected_behavior: Each audio episode must have transcript in adjacent markup or via `<track>`
actual_behavior: No transcript available for audio content
trend: new

finding_id: podcast-player-auto-play-no-pause
fingerprint: 7c3d9e1a2b8f4c6d
source: perspective-audit Auditory Access checklist
wcag_or_apg: 1.4.2 Audio Control
section_508_fpc_context: 508(c)(2)(g) - Auto-playing audio must have immediate pause control
severity: CRITICAL
perspective_alarms: auditory_access=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM
evidence: Audio auto-plays with no pause button in first focus position
reproduction_steps: Select episode via keyboard, no pause control in tab order
expected_behavior: Auto-playing audio must have pause control in first focusable position
actual_behavior: No pause control available until after player controls
trend: new

finding_id: podcast-player-speed-announce
fingerprint: 2e8f1c6a9d4a3b7d
source: perspective-audit Screen Reader Semantic checklist
wcag_or_apg: 4.1.3 Status Messages
section_508_fpc_context: 508(c)(2)(l) - Dynamic content changes must be announced
severity: MAJOR
perspective_alarms: auditory_access=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM
evidence: Speed changes not announced via `aria-live`
reproduction_steps: Change speed via keyboard, no announcement
expected_behavior: Screen readers should announce "Playback speed set to Xx"
actual_behavior: No announcement occurs
trend: new

finding_id: podcast-player-new-badge
fingerprint: 8f4c6d7c3d9e1a2b
source: perspective-audit Screen Reader Semantic checklist
wcag_or_apg: 1.1.1 Non-Text Content
section_508_fpc_context: 508(c)(2)(d) - Non-text content must have text alternatives
severity: MINOR
perspective_alarms: auditory_access=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM
evidence: `.new-badge` has `role="img"` but no `aria-label`
reproduction_steps: Tab to episode item with new badge
expected_behavior: Screen reader should announce "New episode"
actual_behavior: Badge is announced as "graphic" with no description
trend: new
